policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.snippet_en: 2018 Baseline (2030 Goals) 2020 2021 2022 2023 2024 Perspective Energy-Operations Total energy use2 million gigajoules 19.4 20.4 20.7 19.5 19.1 /A/ As of 2024, we reduced our total energy use by 24% from our 2018 baseline. Total electricity2 million MWh 2.11 2.26 2.30 2.21 2.15 /A/ Grid electricity2, 3 % 87.4% 86.7% 87.6% 88.9% 89.5% In 2024, more than 31% of our electrical energy was obtained from renewable sources. Renewable energy2, 4, 5 % 19.7% 24.0% 28.2% 27.7% 31.5% Energy intensity2 absolute million gigajoules energy use/million dollars of sales and revenues 465 400 348 291 295 /A/ From 2018 through 2024, we reduced GHG emissions by improving energy efficiency at our facilities, installing renewable energy capacity at our own sites and purchasing renewable energy. As of 2024, we reduced our Scope 1 (direct) emissions by 28% and our Scope 2 (market-based) emissions by 39% from our 2018 baseline. Scope 1 & 2 Absolute greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions2, 6, 7, 8 million metric tons CO2e 2.08 1.49 1.52 1.49 1.44 1.37 /A/ Scope 1 Direct emissions million metric tons CO2e 0.70 0.74 0.74 0.69 0.68 /A/ Scope 2 Market-based indirect emissions from purchased electricity, heat or steam2, 9 million metric tons CO2e 0.79 0.78 0.75 0.75 0.69 /A/ Scope 2 Location-based2, 9 million metric tons CO2e 0.85 0.86 0.80 0.81 0.77 /A/ Scope 1 & 2 GHG intensity2, 6, 9 absolute metric tons of CO2e/million dollars of sales and revenues 35.7 29.8 25.1
